title: equisetum hyemale var. schleicheri
intro: Equisetum hyemale var. schleicheri, also known as Schleicher's horsetail, is a variant of the Equisetum hyemale species, a perennial vascular plant that belongs to the Equisetaceae family. This plant has been used in traditional medicine for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory and antiseptic properties, making it useful for treating wounds, burns, and skin conditions. The health benefits of Equisetum hyemale var. schleicheri include its ability to promote wound healing, reduce inflammation, and improve respiratory health, making it a popular herbal remedy for various ailments. Equisetum hyemale var. schleicheri is often prepared as a tea, infusion, or tincture, and can also be used in salves and creams to harness its medicinal properties.
